verdict.reason: Two issues: (1) session identity comparison uses .to_string() instead of typed PartialEq — must compare &l.session_identity == s where s is &SessionIdentity, matching guardrail.rs:165. (2) load_with_forge_and_session is private so the session-ownership branch is entirely untested dead code; expose it as pub(crate) or add a test constructor so the mismatch path can be exercised.
